risk_assessment.justification: Limited findings of concern. Routine monitoring sufficient.

executive_summary: Investigation of "sundar pichai" yielded 14 findings across 1 sources, including 0 high or critical items. Key areas of concern involve bellingcat. Review findings below for detailed analysis and recommended actions.

key_findings.analysis: A platform that maintains a database of compromised credentials, with a newly-launched web domain registration search tool.

key_findings.title: 🔗 Namechk
key_findings.analysis: A username and domain search tool that checks on which platforms or domain a given username is registered.

key_findings.title: 🔗 FaceCheck.ID
key_findings.analysis: A facial recognition search engine that tries to find photos of people that look similar to a person of interest.

key_findings.title: 🔗 PimEyes
key_findings.analysis: An AI-powered facial recognition reverse image search tool.

key_findings.title: 🔗 Google Lens
key_findings.analysis: Google Lens is an image recognition tool which can be used to identify locations or objects in photographs.

key_findings.title: 🔗 TinEye
key_findings.analysis: TinEye is a search engine that allows the user to search using images (reverse image search).

key_findings.title: 🔗 Archive.today
key_findings.analysis: Archive any webpage, including Facebook and search for archived pages.

key_findings.title: 🔗 Wayback Machine
key_findings.analysis: The Internet Archive's Wayback Machine lets users view and archive web pages, aiding in historical research and digital preservation.

key_findings.title: 📋 82 Additional Manual Tools
key_findings.analysis:
These free tools are relevant but require manual browser use:
- [192.com](http://www.192.com/): Searching for someone's address in the UK, phone number and who they live with according to electora
- [Blackbird](https://github.com/p1ngul1n0/blackbird): Check usernames and email addresses on websites and social networks
- [DiscordLeaks](https://discordleaks.unicornriot.ninja/): Search hundreds of thousands of messages leaked from 290+ white-supremacist / nazi discord servers.
- [Eniro](https://www.eniro.se/): Yellow Pages (Swedish Edition)
- [FastPeopleSearch](http://fastpeoplesearch.com/): Mostly good for US.
- [GetContact](https://www.getcontact.com/en/): Phonenumber ID app - draws from crowdsourced contactbooks
- [Ghunt](https://github.com/mxrch/GHunt): A command line tool for obtaining information about Google accounts.
- [Have I Been Pwned?](https://haveibeenpwned.com/): Does an email address appear in data breaches?
- [Hitta.se](https://www.hitta.se/): Mapping service for Sweden
- [Intelx.io](http://intelx.io/): Find user details in data breaches
- [Leak-Lookup](https://leak-lookup.com/): An online tool that allows you to search across public data breaches to surface credentials that may
- [Maigret](https://github.com/soxoj/maigret): Maigret is a Python script that retrieves user information by searching for usernames across various
- [Bellingcat Name Variant Search](https://bellingcat.github.io/name-variant-search/): Quickly search many variants of a person's name on Google
- [NeutrOSINT](https://github.com/Kr0wZ/NeutrOSINT): A tool for investigating Proton Mail addresses.
- [NigeriaPhonebook](https://nigeriaphonebook.com/): Look up by name, state, and phone number. Last names are partially censored for free accounts.
... and 67 more

recommended_actions: Archive all evidence URLs with timestamps for chain of custody
Schedule 7-day follow-up investigation to track changes
ai_conclusion:
## Executive Conclusion

### Key Assessment
Sundar Pichai is a high-profile public figure (CEO of Google and Alphabet) with extensive publicly available biographical data. No compromised credentials, offshore leaks, or sensitive personal information were identified in this investigation, consistent with his status as a well-known executive.

### Critical Findings
- **Public Profile Confirmed**: Wikipedia and Wikidata confirm Sundar Pichai’s identity as CEO of Google LLC and Alphabet Inc., with 10 and 3 results respectively.
- **No Breach Data Found**: DeHashed search returned no compromised credentials associated with the query.
- **No Offshore Leaks**: ICIJ Offshore Leaks database returned zero results.
- **Facial Recognition Tools Identified**: Multiple tools (FaceCheck.ID, PimEyes, Google Lens, TinEye) were referenced but require manual use; no automated matches were processed.
- **Archiving Tools Available**: Wayback Machine and Archive.today links were generated but not executed automatically.

### Risk Level
**LOW** — No sensitive data, breaches, or leaks were discovered; the target is a public figure with extensive open-source information.

### Recommended Actions
1. **Manual Verification**: Use facial recognition tools (PimEyes, FaceCheck.ID) with a known photo of Sundar Pichai to check for unauthorized image usage.
2. **Username Check**: Run Namechk manually to verify if any impersonation accounts exist across platforms.
3. **Archive Review**: Check Wayback Machine and Archive.today for any archived pages that may contain unintended disclosures.
